titleStmt.title: SII 26.518: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 518. (A.R. No. 491 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Emmaṇḍº Kulaśēkharadēva: Year 37, Chittirai = 1304-05 A.D.

summary.p: It records that the Śrī-Rudra Śrī-Māhēśvaras of the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Śōḻapuram in Ānmā-nāḍu. had agreed to conduct a festival with procession of the image of the god from the rent realised on a house presented to the temple by a certain Teṉṉilaṅgai Viḷañji alias Śoṟṟagaṅkaḍintāṉ Umaiyorupāgaṉ residing in the street of Nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaṉ-perunteru in Muḍivaḻaṅgupāṇḍyanallūr, in Āṇmā-nāḍu itself.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 7 vatu cittiraimāsam
Āṇmānāṭṭu coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararom Iṉṉāṭṭu muṭivaḻaṅku
pāṇṭiyanallūr nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaṉ perunteruvil Irukkum teṉṉilaṅkai viḷañciyāṉa coṟṟakaṅkaṭintāṉ Umaiyorupāka
ṉukku piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉārkku kulacekaran tiruvūṭal tirumeṉi Eḻuntaruḷuvikka Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
nitta nimantattukku l melpāl Ūrārpakkal Innāyaṉāṟku koṇṭamaṉaiyil kiḻmel ṉ teruvukku paṭikiṟa kāluḷḷa maṉaikku
ḻuki koṇṭa Icaiyāl Imaṉaikkaṭamaikoṇṭu kuṟaivaṟa ścandrātityavat Eḻuntaruḷivippomākavum Ippaṭi sa
Digital edition of SII 26.518 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
